subject: Ecosystem Intel: Indian Funding & AgriTech Landscape Sees Program Consolidation (March 2026)
aiIntro: Ecosystem Intelligence Update: This comprehensive intelligence scan covers the entire Indian Funding and AgriTech Ecosystem for the month of March 2026. The landscape continues to demonstrate robust activity across general startup funding, with a particularly strong emphasis on AgriTech and deep technology sectors including AI, biotechnology, and clean energy. While no new programs were identified this month, five existing programs concluded, indicating a net reduction in available opportunities and suggesting a period of programmatic consolidation within the ecosystem.
opportunities: SIDBI Make in India Soft Loan Fund for MSMEs (SMILE)
